title: Crystal Client
description: A Modpack that optimizes your game for Crystal PVP
body:
![Crystal Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mb9PEDSJ/images/93762730a752fa73e1525fa90c9e0e4e3fbec3e3.png) # The Client For Crystal PvP **I don't own any of these mods, these mods were made by some really great mod creators!** This Modpack/Client is packed with mods to optimize your Crystal PvP experience! Removes those big totems and the explosion texture, it also makes crystals less ping dependent. You can also use this pack for non Crystal PvP game modes. Enjoy! For maximum results turn off: View Bobbing, Vsync, Dmage Tilt, FOV Effects, FOV Distortion, Smooth Lighting, Fancy Graphics, Clouds, Etc. These settings can be found in Accessibility Settings and Video Settings **DISCLAIMER: FEATURES SUCH AS THE LOW FIRE AND NO EXPLOSION TEXTURE WILL HAVE TO BE MANUALLY ACTIVATED VIA THE RESOURCE PACK SETTINGS.**
Patreon Members Shoutout 1. Leopold **Join The Patreon To Get a Shoutout!!**
![Crystal Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mb9PEDSJ/images/a17fa879c23789421ebac485e62c2a83a5cc0fd3.png) ![Crystal Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mb9PEDSJ/images/6e06c0a82d0bb9b9c5f5c63db0d9fbf77d5868df.png) ![Crystal Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mb9PEDSJ/images/f39772f7627118baa37ee53b38d10b53899eea77.png) ### Preloaded Resource Packs! ![Crystal Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mb9PEDSJ/images/dbe7cde01b49c5efadf92c23c6f5a0f03092092c.png) ![## FPS Boost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mb9PEDSJ/images/2c3f1a447061f183a7ae4bfb045a204daa8de95d.png)
